hardened_backend_telemetry.p99_latency_profile: Stabilized under 1.2s via asyncio timeout guards

enforced_api_contracts: Global error boundaries emit bracketed custom exception logs: [VALIDATION_ERROR] and [TENANT_AUTH_ERROR]

Track 1 gateway throttles emit [RATE_LIMIT_EXHAUSTED] at HTTP 429 for exhausted tenant or session windows

validation: Reviewed mandatory .antigravity guardrails and core engineering role constraints before runtime entrypoint mutation.
Attempted to create feature/render-worker-count-runtime branch, but .git refs are read-only in the sandbox.
Replaced hardcoded uvicorn workers=4 with WEB_CONCURRENCY-driven worker count defaulting to 1.
Added validation so invalid or non-positive WEB_CONCURRENCY values fall back to 1.
Validated entrypoint behavior with fake uvicorn.run: WEB_CONCURRENCY=1 passes workers=1 and WEB_CONCURRENCY=bad falls back to workers=1 without opening a socket.
Attempted local git commit for main.py and agent_memory_harness.json, but .git/index.lock creation failed because .git is read-only in the sandbox.
